project.name: platvision-id
project.runtimeConstraint: Python Flask with Ultralytics YOLO and PaddleOCR adapters
project.architectureConstraint: single deployable Flask monolith with feature-oriented ALPR module

repoEvidence.designEvidenceSummary: The UI is a Flask-rendered upload and recognition workspace. The design contract is derived from the requested ALPR upload and recognition workflow, including visible localization, OCR crop inspection, and an optional official-source tax lookup panel or manual source link.

motionPaletteDecision.densityDecisionSource: Short demo task with one upload action, one recognition result, compact diagnostics, and secondary official-source tax details when available.
motionPaletteDecision.spatialDecision: 3D and canvas are unnecessary because the product task is image upload, OCR feedback, and result inspection.

conceptualAnchor.name: Vehicle inspection lightbox
conceptualAnchor.anchorReference: industrial vehicle inspection lightbox with scan lane and measured readout
conceptualAnchor.agentResearchMode: synthesized from current product brief and official library documentation
conceptualAnchor.specificReferencePoint: matte inspection bench, illuminated scan lane, and calibrated measurement readout
conceptualAnchor.rationale: The user needs to inspect an uploaded vehicle image, understand where the plate was localized, see the crop read by OCR, trust the OCR confidence and fallback notes, and optionally inspect official tax lookup fields or a manual official source in a secondary readout.
conceptualAnchor.signatureMotion: A short horizontal scan-line reveal runs across the preview and result surface after recognition; reduced motion switches to an immediate state update.
conceptualAnchor.typographicDecision: Plate text uses a monospace readout style, labels use compact sans-serif metadata, and body text stays plain for clarity.

derivedTokenLogic.morphology: Small-radius panels, firm borders, and lane-like horizontal emphasis derive from the lightbox bench.
derivedTokenLogic.motion: Scan-line timing and state transitions derive from inspection equipment passing over a target.

conceptualAnchor.visualRiskBudget: Moderate distinctiveness with high readability and no decorative dashboard chrome.
conceptualAnchor.motionRiskBudget: Light motion only; no continuous animation after the result is shown.

derivedTokenLogic.anchorReference: industrial vehicle inspection lightbox with scan lane and measured readout
derivedTokenLogic.colorDerivationSource: Workbench neutrals, amber inspection light, green pass, red error, and blue informational roles derive from physical inspection equipment states.
derivedTokenLogic.spacingDerivationSource: A compact 8px base grid with wider scan lanes derives from measured lightbox layout.
derivedTokenLogic.typographyDerivationSource: Monospace plate readouts and compact metadata derive from calibrated instrument displays.
derivedTokenLogic.motionDerivationSource: Short horizontal scan reveals derive from inspection light passing across the target.
derivedTokenLogic.validationRule: Every color, spacing, typography, and motion token must map to the inspection lightbox anchor.

libraryDecisions.fallbackIfUnavailable: Use Python standard library HTTP only for tests; not recommended for the demo app.

libraryDecisions.purpose: YOLO-family object detection, defaulting to YOLO26 demo weights when no local plate model exists.
libraryDecisions.fallbackIfUnavailable: Keep detector injectable and run tests with a fake detector.

libraryDecisions.purpose: OCR for cropped license plate images.
libraryDecisions.fallbackIfUnavailable: Keep OCR injectable and run tests with a fake OCR reader.

spacing.exceptions: Preview and result areas get larger vertical rhythm to make uploaded imagery readable.

motion.reducedMotion: Disable scan sweep and use instant opacity/state changes.

mutationRules.mobile: Upload first, plate result second, diagnostics disclosed below.
mutationRules.tablet: Stack upload and result, keep metrics and tax lookup fields in compact rows.
mutationRules.desktop: Use two primary columns with upload on the left and result inspection on the right.

requirements: status region for loading, success, and errors

reviewRubric: The UI shows fallback state clearly.
The preview bounding box aligns with the displayed image after responsive resizing.
The crop preview makes the OCR input visible when the service returns an encoded crop.
The optional tax lookup panel is visually secondary and labels its official source.
Plate text is visually distinct as data.
Responsive layout recomposes instead of only shrinking.
Motion follows the scan-lane anchor and respects reduced motion.
The interface does not look like a generic dashboard.
